scripts.dev:qa: HORSEY_DB_PATH=/tmp/horsey-qa.db HORSEY_ENABLE_DEV_ACCOUNT_PICKER=1 HORSEY_EMAIL_DRY_RUN_LOG=1 HORSEY_DEV_AUTO_ADMIN=1 node apps/api/server.mjs
scripts.dev:bustling: HORSEY_DB_PATH=/tmp/horsey-bustling.db HORSEY_ENABLE_DEV_BOTS=1 HORSEY_ENABLE_DEV_ACCOUNT_PICKER=1 HORSEY_EMAIL_DRY_RUN_LOG=1 HORSEY_DEV_AUTO_ADMIN=1 node apps/api/server.mjs
scripts.dev:analysis: HORSEY_EMAIL_DRY_RUN_LOG=1 HORSEY_DEV_AUTO_ADMIN=1 HORSEY_ANALYSIS_ENABLED=1 STOCKFISH_PATH=/usr/games/stockfish HORSEY_ANALYSIS_DEPTH=12 node apps/api/server.mjs
scripts.dev:bustling-lichess: HORSEY_EMAIL_DRY_RUN_LOG=1 HORSEY_DEV_AUTO_ADMIN=1 HORSEY_ANALYSIS_ENABLED=1 STOCKFISH_PATH=/usr/games/stockfish HORSEY_ANALYSIS_DEPTH=12 HORSEY_ENABLE_PGN_BUSTLING=1 node apps/api/server.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint && npm test
